meta.title: Edumate - Learning Continuity Support Platform | D'auchy.Studio
meta.description: Learn together, keep it consistent. Designed with peace of mind for parents. A service where friends can collaborate on homework reviews and joint studying.

title: Edumate
subtitle: Valuing both study and friendship.
description: Learn together, keep it consistent. Designed with peace of mind for parents.
heroDescription: A service where friends can collaborate on homework reviews and joint studying, while creating reports for parents. Deepen understanding through collaborative learning.

whatIsEdumate.title: What is Edumate?
whatIsEdumate.description: Student pairs (e.g., you and a friend) automatically convert today's learning into AI-generated "key point cards." Make learning more sustainable through next-day one-point reviews and pair-only sharing & reactions.
whatIsEdumate.note: We provide "Mom Login" for parents to see only "study time, review completion rate, and continuous days" - the content of conversations is not visible.

studentA.title: Student A (Son)
studentA.description: Main user of the pair learning app

howToUse.title: How to Use (3 Steps)

input.title: Input
input.description: Copy-paste key points from class notes or handouts, or upload files

ai.title: AI Card Creation
ai.description: Automatically generate 3-line summaries, 5 key points to remember, real-world applications, and mini-quizzes

reminder.title: Next-Day Reminder
reminder.description: Get 1 question + application examples via notification. Quick review for retention

howToUse.uiExample: UI Example: [+ New Learning] [Add File] [Share with Pair] [Tomorrow's Reminder ON]

upload.title: Learning Content Input (Text / File)
upload.description: Extract the "core of study" from note photos, PDFs, and typed text. No complex formatting required.

aiConversion.title: AI Conversion (Key Point Cards)
aiConversion.description: Structure learning content into 4 elements for easier understanding.
details: 3-line summary: Just the core of the lesson
5 key points to remember: List the essentials for tests
Real-world applications: Practical examples that make learning meaningful

reminder.title: Next-Day Reminder (1 question + application review)
reminder.description: Just one question the next day. Short enough to always continue. Re-display applications to "reconnect" memories.

sharing.title: Sharing (Pair-only)
sharing.description: One-tap sharing of created key point cards. Partner participates with reactions and simple quiz answers.
details: Content is not visible to parents

analytics.title: Learning Log Visualization
analytics.description: Automatically record study time, accuracy rate, and consecutive learning days.

parentLogin.title: Mom Login (View-only)
parentLogin.description: Only study time, review completion rate, and consecutive days are visible. Conversation content is hidden.

continuity.title: Consistency Problem
continuity.description: Minimize the barrier to action with "ultra-mini reviews" of just one question the next day

parentAnxiety.title: Parent Anxiety
parentAnxiety.description: "Are they really studying?" → Peace of mind through visible numbers (content remains private)

limitedSharing.title: Limited Sharing
limitedSharing.description: Pair sharing is limited to the individuals involved. Parents only see numerical summaries

privacyProtection.title: Privacy Protection
privacyProtection.description: Personal information like school/grade names is optional (not required)

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.description: Data is stored encrypted. Supports data deletion upon withdrawal

questions.question: Can two people use it for different subjects?
questions.answer: Yes. We create cards for each subject. Strengths and weaknesses are automatically visualized.

questions.question: How long do the quizzes take?
questions.answer: 1-2 minutes is expected. The basic approach is "just 1 question" the next day.

questions.question: Can parents see the content?
questions.answer: No. Only study time, review rate, and consecutive days are displayed.

questions.question: Can I review everything before a test?
questions.answer: Yes. You can batch review key point cards by unit or date.

cta.title: Start a New Learning Style Together
cta.description: Would you like to experience a secure learning platform that values both study and friendship?
